meaning: adj.恶魔似的,残忍的,极坏的
examples: This was a fiendish act of wickedness.
So he concocted a fiendish scheme to trick her into paying.
A rather neat option allows you to design your own fiendish puzzle.
New-fangled finance has its flaws, from the procyclicality of its leverage to its fiendish complexity.
If the economics of Mr Paulson's plan are broadly correct, the politics are fiendish.
